bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=morning-brief-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 10 · Forecasts emitted: 96 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / diagnostician report, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-19 · [coverage_followup] 要求 biotech-analyst 增加产业链覆盖

DONE · owner=biotech-analyst · research discussion=要求 biotech-analyst 增加产业链覆盖 (led by biotech-analyst)

根据 §6.1，生命健康和生物科技产业链激活率极低（1.8%），要求其下一阶段 thesis 至少覆盖 3 个新成员。

  • Outcome: research discussion "要求 biotech-analyst 增加产业链覆盖" → completed | cards=10 | last--05-19：本报告对前序研究进行压力测试，结论是中国反制不是基准情形下的全面API禁运，而是“窄院子、可扩门”的选择性许可与实体反制。核心工具包括不可靠实体清单、两用物项出口许可、人类遗传资源管控、核心技术出口许可，以及对KSM、试剂、溶剂、稀土磁材等上游输入的最终用户审查。执行节奏以2026-07-31与2026-09-29 Section 232生效日、2026-12-18前OMB BIOSECURE清单、2027年仿制药重新评估为关键节点。 | → 4 forecast(s) on CDMO,CM,GM,COGS, 0 position(s) op…

  • Forecasts: 4 (0 positions); tickers: CDMO, CM, GM, COGS

2026-05-16 · [research_task] Merge EU/China EV pairing and A-share EV alt-data

DONE · owner=ashare-strategist · research discussion=Merge EU/China EV pairing and A-share EV alt-data (led by ashare-strategist)

Propose to merge EU/China EV pairing with A-share EV alt-data to clarify whether the window is 3-6 or 6-9 months, as listed in the execution list.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Merge EU/China EV pairing and A-share EV alt-data" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-05-17，本报告将智驾成本曲线纳入A股EV最终执行：整车仓位不应维持宽基30-35%不变，也不应大幅砍仓；应以30%为基准、28-32%为操作区间，进一步集中到高ASP、数据闭环和智驾变现能力明确的龙头。若当前整车高于30%，把3-5个百分点从宽基整车Beta回拨至电池与储能底仓，使电池/储能升至50-55%，材料维持15-18%战术对冲。模型组合为电池/储能52%、整车30%、材料18%。

  • Forecasts: 20 (0 positions); tickers: TTF, NEV, MIP, SDV, TCO, CUPRA

2026-05-16 · [research_task] Merge Xi-Trump scenario matrix and FDPR political cost stress test

DONE · owner=global-macro · research discussion=AI capex降beta：供应瓶颈还是需求斜率下修 (led by chief-strategist)

Combine the Xi-Trump scenario matrix with the FDPR political cost stress test into a single conditional tree, as per the execution list.

  • Outcome: research discussion "AI capex降beta：供应瓶颈还是需求斜率下修" → completed | cards=8 | last-card: 本次 QA 审计已完成。通过对研究记录 01 07 全链条研究内容的深度核查，确认该 AI capex 降 beta 研究系列在日期锚点 (2026 05 16)、核心持仓 (思源电气、中际旭创、中国核电、英维克、工业富联、特变电工、巨化股份)、权重分配 (合计 100 单位) 以及剔除清单 (泛散热、二线光模块等) 上保持高度内部一致性。逻辑推演从宏观主题去伪存真到各细分供应瓶颈的收敛过程证据充分，双语结论准确对齐。审计结论为： 通过 (PASS)，授权发布。 Wrote research discussion/c3404a97 43f9 4346 8e1c 16e416…

  • Forecasts: 57 (0 positions); tickers: GB, ODM, 002028.SZ, 300308.SZ, 601985.SH, PUE
